nodes.name: 🔐 内部トークン検証 + 入力検証

parameters.query: SELECT ma.marketplace_id, ma.api_key_encrypted, ma.site_id FROM marketplace_accounts ma WHERE ma.user_id = $1 AND (ma.marketplace_id = $2 OR ma.marketplace_id LIKE 'ebay_%') AND ma.status = 'active' ORDER BY CASE WHEN ma.marketplace_id = $2 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END LIMIT 1

nodes.name: 📦 マルチテナント: アカウント取得
レガシートークン要否

parameters.query: SELECT access_token FROM ebay_tokens WHERE environment = 'production' AND user_id = $1 ORDER BY expires_at DESC LIMIT 1

options.queryParams: ={{ [$node['🔐 内部トークン検証 + 入力検証'].json.user_id] }}

nodes.name: レガシートークン取得（user_id）
レガシートークンマージ

parameters.query: SELECT pm.id, pm.sku, pm.title_en, pm.product_name, pm.description_en, pm.listing_price, pm.image_urls, pm.ebay_category_id, pm.item_specifics, pm.updated_at, COALESCE(im.physical_quantity, 1) as physical_quantity FROM products_master pm LEFT JOIN inventory_master im ON im.product_master_id = pm.id AND im.user_id = pm.user_id WHERE pm.id = $1 AND pm.user_id = $2 LIMIT 1

options.queryParams: ={{ [$node['🔐 内部トークン検証 + 入力検証'].json.product_id, $node['🔐 内部トークン検証 + 入力検証'].json.user_id] }}

nodes.name: 📦 商品情報取得（マルチテナント＋JOIN user_id）

parameters.query: INSERT INTO marketplace_listings (product_master_id, marketplace_id, item_id, external_item_id, status, listed_at, created_at, updated_at, user_id) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $3, 'active', NOW(), NOW(), NOW(), $4) ON CONFLICT (product_master_id, marketplace_id) DO UPDATE SET item_id = EXCLUDED.item_id, status = 'active', listed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE marketplace_listings.updated_at <= $5::timestamp OR $5 IS NULL RETURNING id

nodes.name: 📝 出品記録（楽観的ロック）

parameters.query: INSERT INTO listing_history (product_master_id, marketplace_id, item_id, action, details, user_id, created_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, 'listed', jsonb_build_object('s', true, 'a', $4), $5, NOW())

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, product_id: $node['📊 レスポンス解析'].json.product_id, item_id: $node['📊 レスポンス解析'].json.item_id, marketplace: $node['📊 レスポンス解析'].json.marketplace }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO listing_history (product_master_id, marketplace_id, action, details, user_id, created_at) VALUES ($1, $2, 'failed', jsonb_build_object('s', false, 'e', $3, 'a', $4), $5, NOW())

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, product_id: $json.product_id, error: $json.error, ack: $json.ack }) }}

parameters.query: DELETE FROM listing_history WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND user_id = $1

nodes.name: 🔐 HMAC署名検証
